title: Company Names Tribunal decision: UK Sanofi Crop Science Co., Ltd
body: " Application number 5375  Applicant Sanofi objected to the name used by UK Sanofi Crop Science Co., Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 23 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of UK Sanofi Crop Science Co., Ltd is changed to 14490961, Ltd. "
